description: You are a Fleet Manager updating safety records. Audit the safety ratings and recall counts for three 2023 vehicle models on nhtsa.gov: the 2023 Toyota Camry (4-Door Sedan), 2023 Ford F-150 (Super Crew), and 2023 Jeep Wrangler (4-Door Unlimited). Create a report at /home/ga/Desktop/fleet_safety_report.txt listing the Vehicle Name, Overall 5-Star Safety Rating, and total Recall Count for each. Additionally, download the 'Electronic Stability Control' technical report for the 2023 Toyota Camry to the Downloads folder.
